title: Add structured execution capability and action registry surfaces for the planner
description: Create an execution capability model and action registry that expose what the agent can do, what preconditions/postconditions each action has, and which tool/action schemas are available to the planner. This gives the LLM and the planner a structured, explicit view of action semantics instead of relying on prompt-only assumptions. Source: Data/Pages/Audits/sprint-56-wave-b-audit.md and Data/Pages/Audits/2026-06-30_memorysmith_llm_agent_architecture_execution_context_and_replanning_audit.md.
